Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Nov-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Stephen J. Gorog, Esq. appeared with petitioner Paulit Gaines, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Nakia Lemon, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $2,500.00.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Medical Expenses - $0.00.
Costs - $606.87.

The net balance of $1,893.13 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Chase Bank, located at Market & Eighth Streets, San Francisco, CA. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court. Counsel for petitioner shall submit a proposed Order to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account by Wednesday, November 24, 2010.

Matter is continued to December 21, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. for Progress Report re: Receipt & Acknowledgment of Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account.
